name: citadel
description: Codex-native agent orchestration harness for durable campaigns, skills, hooks, telemetry, and parallel work.

interface.shortDescription: Codex-native orchestration: 46 skills, campaigns, fleet coordination, quality gates
interface.longDescription: Citadel adds durable planning state, reusable skills, lifecycle hooks, telemetry, PR triage, and coordinated multi-agent workflows to Codex.
defaultPrompt: Use Citadel to route this task through the right skill and verification loop.
Use Citadel to continue the active campaign and report current state.
